titleStmt.title: SII 11.101: original edition by C. R. Krishnamacharlu, R. S. Panchamukhi, N. Lakshminaraya Rao and H. K. Narasimhaswami
No. 101. (B.K. No. 83 of 1927-28). ĀLŪR, MUNDARGI PETHA, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE MAṆḌAPA OF THE NĀGĒŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This damaged inscription belongs to king Traiḷōkyamalladēva and states that, during the administration of [Mahā]maṇḍalēśvara Śaucharasa, Mahāsāmantādhipati Daṇḍa- nāyaka Vāsudēvayya, who was the son of Kāḷidāsa, the Maneverggaḍe of king Kīrtivarma, and Mākaṇabbe and who belonged to the Śrīvatsa-gōtra made an endowment of land at Māḷadālūru in Māsiyavāḍi One Hundred and Forty, which he had received from Ballavarasa.

The record is dated Śaka 989, • • • • Māgha, amāvāsyā, Monday, solar eclipse. In Śaka 989 which was Plavaṅga, Māgha, amāvāsyā with solar eclipse occurred on Wednesday, February 6, A.D. 1068. The week-day is wrongly given in the inscription as Monday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja para
mēsvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābha
raṇaṁ śrīma traiḷōkyamalladēvara vijayarājya muttarōttarābhivṛ
ddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire . janapatiya
kīrttivarmmana manaverggaḍe kāḷidāsavibhugaṁ candrānane mākaṇabbegaṁ nandana nā
daṁ vāsudēvadaṇḍādīśa . svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāsāmantā
dhipati mahāpracaṇḍadaṇḍanāyakaṁ śrīvatsasantānasāgarasamutpannasantā
nakaṁ cārucāritra ratnaratnākaraṁ śrī tārakatārakāḷōkakōkāniśākaraṁ . sarasva
tīśravaṇakusumāvataṁsaṁ sujanaguṇasarōvaravihārakaḷahamsaṁ durjjanavanaja
vanavanyavēdaṇḍaṁ vipramārttaṇḍaṁ cāturīcaturalāsikālāsyalīlā
sūktisudatībhujaṅgaṁ niravadhiniyōganītivarttanaṁ satyavākyavaikarttanaṁ . vipravidyā
sēnādhipatyapadavīdhuraṁdharaṁ . siṣṭalōkarakṣāmaṇi sujanacūḍāmaṇi mitrajanacai
traṁ jagadēkamitraṁ śrīmaddaṇḍanāyakaṁ vāsudēvayyaṅgaḷ . śrīyaṁ paḍedaṁ paḍedātta
lepaṭuvādanāgi tannane palaruṁ jīyene jasamaṁ paḍeda namēyaguṇaṁ vāsudēvadaṇḍādhīśa .
mecaritane mikkakkarigane dhārmmikane vāsudēva palaroḷ nirupamacaritanītane mikkakka
rmmikanevāsudēvaṁ jagadoḷ . Entuṁ nōḷpoḍavanunnatanentuṁ bagevaḍamudāratējō
parikipoḍaṁ vikrāntadhanaṁ vāsudēvadaṇḍādhīśaṁ . nayavidanenisida nakhiḷō
rjjitapuṇyarāsi viprōttama nakṣayamūrtti kāḷidāsapriyatanaya vāsudēva
Intu negarttevaḍedaṁ śrīmaddaṇḍanāyaka vāsudēvayyaṅgaḷ . samadhigata paṁcama
maṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ śrīmatsaucarasar . śrīśuddhakīrtti bandhu kuśēśayacaṇḍāṁśu daṇḍi
śauci yartthaśauci mahāśauci yenalke śaucabhūpa nnegaḻdaṁ . Ā nripakā
rvviteṟaṁjaki maṁjughōṣagāminakigaṁ samānaki tiḷōttame guttame raṁbhegiṁ
rūpavati nāgaladēvi navīnalakṣmi padmānane padmagandhi negaḻdaḷ mū
ṟulōkadoḷ . Intu negaḻtevaḍeda śaucarasarāḷkeyalu . sakavarṣa 989 ne
tsarada māghada Amavāsye sōmavāraṁ sūryyagraha
lliṇiyatīrttha sthānadal śrīballavarasarkkūḍe sarvvabādhā
ramāge paḍedu māsiyavāḍi nūṟanālvattaṟa baḷi
māḷadālūral koḍaṁgeyya tevaraleraḍuṁ sthaḷamā
biṭṭa mattar nūṟu Adakke sīme Iṭṭageya poladamē
baḍagaṇa sīme Iṭṭageya polada mēre paḍuvaṇa sīme
ṇana sattageyyiṁ mūḍal Iṭṭage baṭṭeyi
mattaṁ sirivurdda gāvuṇḍageṟeyiṁ mūḍalu
vagegalannaḍevu dintinitumaṁ yamani
japahōmasamādhi śīḷaguṇa
hājana viḻnūrvvaruṁ se The continuation is lost.
Digital edition of SII 11.101 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
